title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that the Customization page renders with all required controls
customPreconds: User is on the Cookie Banner tab. The Customization page is open. The sidebar contains five tabs: General, Layout, Content, Colours, Custom CSS. The banner preview is visible on the right.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the General tab is selected in the Customization sidebar.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The General tab should be highlighted and the General section content should be displayed.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the banner preview panel is visible to the right of the sidebar.
customStepsSeparated.expected: A live banner preview should be displayed.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Publish Changes button is visible at the bottom of the sidebar.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The "Publish Changes" button should be present but disabled by default until changes are made in the Customization settings.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that the General section renders with all required cards and controls
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Law selector is set to GDPR (default).

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Consent Template card is visible at the top of the General section with the Law selector on its right.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Consent Template card should be displayed with the Law selector dropdown visible.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Geo-target banner card is visible below the Consent Template card.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Geo-target banner card should be displayed with Worldwide, EU Countries & UK, and Select Countries options.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Support IAB TCF v2.3 card is visible below the Geo-target banner card.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Support IAB TCF v2.3 toggle should be displayed.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Show advanced settings control is visible at the bottom of the General section.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The "Show advanced settings" control should be displayed as the last item in the section.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that the Consent Template defaults to the GDPR opt-in template
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Law selector in the Consent Template card shows "GDPR".
customStepsSeparated.expected: GDPR should be selected by default in the Law selector.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the banner preview displays the GDPR opt-in template.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The opt-in banner template should be shown in the preview panel.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that selecting US State Laws applies the opt-out template
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Law selector is set to GDPR (default).

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the Law selector dropdown in the Consent Template card.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The dropdown should open showing GDPR, US State Laws, and GDPR & US State Laws.

customStepsSeparated.content: Select "US State Laws".
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Law selector label should update to "US State Laws".

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the banner preview switches to the opt-out template.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The opt-out banner template should appear in the preview panel.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Publish Changes".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Changes should be saved and the US State Laws opt-out banner should be active on the website.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that the Law selector lists GDPR, US State Laws, and GDPR & US State Laws options
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the Law selector dropdown in the Consent Template card.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The dropdown should open.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the dropdown shows exactly three options: GDPR, US State Laws, and GDPR & US State Laws, each with a help icon.
customStepsSeparated.expected: All three options should be listed with their respective help icons.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that GDPR & US State Laws mode adds a Customize sub-dropdown switching between GDPR and US State Laws panels
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. User is on a paid plan (Pro or higher).

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the Law selector dropdown and select "GDPR & US State Laws".
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Law selector label should update to "GDPR & US State Laws" and a "Customize" sub-dropdown should appear in the Consent Template card.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the Customize sub-dropdown.
customStepsSeparated.expected: GDPR and US State Laws should be listed as options.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify GDPR is selected by default in the Customize dropdown.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Customize dropdown should show "GDPR" and the banner preview should display the opt-in template.

customStepsSeparated.content: Select "US State Laws" from the Customize dropdown.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Customize dropdown should update to "US State Laws" and the banner preview should switch to the opt-out template.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Publish Changes".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Changes should be saved and both GDPR and US State Laws banners should be active on the website.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that the Geo-target banner defaults to Worldwide under GDPR
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Law selector is set to GDPR (default).

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Geo-target banner card lists three options: Worldwide, EU Countries & UK, and Select Countries.
customStepsSeparated.expected: All three options should be displayed with radio buttons.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify Worldwide is selected by default.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Worldwide radio button should be selected.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that the Geo-target banner offers Worldwide, United States, and Select Countries under US State Laws
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Law selector set to US State Laws.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Geo-target banner card lists three options: Worldwide, United States, and Select Countries.
customStepsSeparated.expected: All three options should be displayed with radio buttons.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify Worldwide is selected by default.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Worldwide radio button should be selected.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Publish Changes".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Changes should be saved and the US State Laws banner should display worldwide.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that selecting Select Countries restricts the banner to the chosen countries
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. User is on a paid plan (Pro or higher). Law selector set to GDPR. (Select Countries behaves identically under US State Laws — same case covers both.)

customStepsSeparated.content: Under the Geo-target banner card, select "Select Countries".
customStepsSeparated.expected: A country selection dropdown should appear with country names and checkboxes.

customStepsSeparated.content: Select one or more countries from the dropdown.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The selected countries should show as checked.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Publish Changes".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Changes should be saved and the banner should display only in the selected countries on the website.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that the Support IAB TCF v2.3 card displays its toggles and dependency under GDPR
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Law selector is set to GDPR (default).

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Support IAB TCF v2.3 toggle is visible below the Geo-target banner card and is off by default.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The IAB TCF v2.3 toggle should be displayed and disabled.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Support Google's Additional Consent Mode toggle is visible below and disabled.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The toggle should be visible and uninteractable while IAB TCF v2.3 is off.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Enable Google's Advertiser Consent Mode toggle is visible below and disabled.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The toggle should be visible and uninteractable while IAB TCF v2.3 is off.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that disabling the Show banner toggle hides the US State Laws banner
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Law selector set to US State Laws. The Show banner toggle is visible and enabled by default.

customStepsSeparated.content: Disable the Show banner toggle below the Geo-target banner card.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The US State Laws banner should be hidden and an info bar should appear above the preview panel: 'The "US State Laws" banner is currently hidden. To display it on your site, enable the "Show banner" option in General settings.'

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Publish Changes".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Changes should be saved and the US State Laws banner should not appear on the website.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that the Do Not Sell link card provides the copyable DNS HTML snippet under US State Laws
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Law selector set to US State Laws. The "Do Not Sell" link card is visible below the Show banner toggle.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the card displays an HTML code snippet in a text area.
customStepsSeparated.expected: A text area containing the DNS link HTML snippet should be visible.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the Copy code button inside the text area (top-right corner).
customStepsSeparated.expected: The HTML code should be copied to the clipboard and the Copy button should briefly indicate success.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that selecting EU Countries & UK restricts the banner to EU/UK regions
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. User is on a paid plan (Pro or higher). Law selector is set to GDPR.

customStepsSeparated.content: Under the Geo-target banner card, select "EU Countries & UK".
customStepsSeparated.expected: The EU Countries & UK radio button should be selected.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Publish Changes".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Changes should be saved and the banner should display only in EU Countries & UK regions on the website.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that selecting United States restricts the banner to the United States under US State Laws
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. User is on a paid plan (Pro or higher). Law selector set to US State Laws.

customStepsSeparated.content: Under the Geo-target banner card, select "United States".
customStepsSeparated.expected: The United States radio button should be selected.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Publish Changes".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Changes should be saved and the banner should display only to users in the United States.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that publishing with Select Countries but no countries selected shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. User is on a paid plan (Pro or higher). Select Countries is selected under the Geo-target banner card.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Publish Changes" without selecting any countries from the country dropdown.
customStepsSeparated.expected: A validation message "Please select countries" should appear below the Select Countries option and changes should not be saved.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that enabling Support IAB TCF v2.3 activates the dependent consent-mode toggles and TCF banner
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. User is on a paid plan (Pro or higher). Law selector is set to GDPR.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enable the Support IAB TCF v2.3 toggle.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The IAB TCF v2.3 banner should appear in the banner preview. The Support Google's Additional Consent Mode and Enable Google's Advertiser Consent Mode toggles should become interactable.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enable the Support Google's Additional Consent Mode toggle.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The partner count in the IAB TCF v2.3 banner should increase and a Google Ad Tech providers list should appear.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enable the Enable Google's Advertiser Consent Mode toggle.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The toggle should switch to on.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Publish Changes".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Changes should be saved and the IAB TCF v2.3 banner should be active on the website.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that Show advanced settings reveals the Consent expiration and Reload page controls
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Show advanced settings" at the bottom of the General section.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Consent expiration (days) field and the Reload page on consent action toggle should appear.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that the Consent expiration field defaults to 365 days and persists on publish
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Show advanced settings is expanded. The Consent expiration (days) field is visible.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Consent expiration (days) field shows 365 by default.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The field should contain the value 365.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Publish Changes".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Changes should be saved and the banner should reappear to users 365 days after they give consent.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that enabling Reload page on consent action reloads the site on consent
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Show advanced settings is expanded. The Reload page on consent action toggle is visible and off by default.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enable the Reload page on consent action toggle.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The toggle should switch to on.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Publish Changes".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Changes should be saved.

customStepsSeparated.content: Navigate to the website and interact with the cookie banner.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The page should reload immediately after consent is given or declined.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that the Consent expiration field rejects invalid values with a validation message
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Show advanced settings is expanded. The Consent expiration (days) field is visible.

customStepsSeparated.content: Attempt to type letters or special characters into the Consent expiration field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The field should not accept non-numeric input.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter an out-of-range number (e.g. 0 or 10000) into the field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: A validation message "Please enter a value between 1 and 9999" should appear below the field.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that clicking a geo-target crown icon opens the upgrade nudge
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Law selector set to GDPR. EU Countries & UK and Select Countries show crown icons.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the crown icon next to "EU Countries & UK" under the Geo-target banner card.
customStepsSeparated.expected: An upgrade nudge should appear showing "Display your banner only in select countries and regions" with an upgrade CTA button.

customStepsSeparated.content: Dismiss the nudge and click the crown icon next to "Select Countries".
customStepsSeparated.expected: The same upgrade nudge should appear.

customStepsSeparated.content: Set the Law selector to US State Laws.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Geo-target banner card should update to show Worldwide, United States, and Select Countries with crown icons on United States and Select Countries.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the crown icon next to "United States".
customStepsSeparated.expected: An upgrade nudge should appear with an upgrade CTA button.

customStepsSeparated.content: Dismiss the nudge and click the crown icon next to "Select Countries".
customStepsSeparated.expected: The same upgrade nudge should appear.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that clicking the IAB TCF v2.3 crown icon opens the upgrade nudge
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. Law selector set to GDPR. The Support IAB TCF v2.3 option shows an upgrade icon.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the upgrade icon next to "Support IAB TCF v2.3".
customStepsSeparated.expected: An upgrade nudge should appear showing "Comply with IAB TCF and Google's requirements" with an upgrade CTA button.

title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that the Geo-target banner shows the correct options under GDPR & US State Laws
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > General tab. User is on a paid plan (Pro or higher). Law selector set to GDPR & US State Laws.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Geo-target banner card options.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The card should display Worldwide, EU Countries & UK, United States, and Select Countries as options. [inferred — verify against live app]

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify Worldwide is selected by default.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Worldwide radio button should be selected. [inferred — verify against live app]
